name: odoo-executive-assistant
description: Expert-level knowledge of creating and configuring Odoo AI Executive Assistant agents for calendar management, email, discuss communication, and activity management in Odoo 19.

patterns.agent_structure: Agent (#17) + Topic (#16) + Tools (13 server actions) + Composers (3) + Prompt Buttons (12)
patterns.naming_convention: AI: <Verb> <Noun> for tools (e.g. AI: Create Event, AI: Read Inbox)
patterns.tool_linking: Set use_in_ai=True on server actions before they can be linked to topics (domain filter)
patterns.mcp_limitation: MCP execute_approved_write does not persist many2many commands — use XML-RPC for tool_ids linking
